title: Family Photo Restoration & Enhancement for Large Format Printing
brief: I have one treasured family photograph that needs careful digital restoration so it can be professionally printed in large format and proudly displayed. Scope of work The photograph currently contains two fingers intruding into opposite corners of the image. These must be completely removed and the affected areas rebuilt so that the maple tree canopy, sky, and surrounding landscape appear natural, seamless, and consistent with the original photograph. If possible, I would also like the visible tree canopy and surrounding scene subtly extended to create a more balanced composition suitable for larger-format printing. Faces are extremely important in this project. Every facial feature, expression, and detail of the people in the photograph must remain faithful to the original image. No alterations to faces, body shape, age, or appearance are permitted. Please also remove any other minor distractions that detract from the image, while preserving the authenticity of the original photograph. Deliverables (all mandatory): • High-resolution, print-ready PNG • High-resolution TIFF • A smaller JPG preview for quick sharing I will approve the work once the fingers and other distractions are invisible, the tree canopy blends seamlessly, colours remain true to the original, and the file prints cleanly at large format.
